recommendations.title: Stand by Me Doraemon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Sewashi and Doraemon find themselves way back in time and meet Nobita. It is up to Doraemon to take care of Nobita or else he will not return to the present.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me Doraemon 2
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Nobita travels to the future to show his beloved grandma his bride, but adult Nobita has fled his own wedding.

recommendations.title: Returner
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the future forces a local gunman to help her stop an impending alien invasion which will wipe out the human race.

recommendations.title: Dragon Quest: Your Story
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Family
recommendations.overview: Luca follows in his father's footsteps to rescue his mother from evil Ladja. Finding the heavenly hero who wields the Zenithian sword is his only hope.
recommendations.director: Ryuichi Yagi, Takashi Yamazaki, Makoto Hanafusa

recommendations.title: Godzilla Minus One
recommendations.overview: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

recommendations.title: Parasyte: Part 2
recommendations.overview: Humanity is under attack by human-mimicking flesh-eating alien parasites. One parasite bonds with his young high school student host, and he convinces the parasite to help him stop the others.

recommendations.title: Parasyte: Part 1
recommendations.overview: Humanity is suffering from a series of mysterious murders across the globe, known as the 'Mincemeat murders'. High school student Izumi Shinichi has a parasite living off him, having replaced his right hand, and he might be the discoverer of truth.

recommendations.title: Lupin the 3rd
recommendations.overview: Interpol Inspector Zenigata begins a world-wide hunt for the infamous thief Arsène Lupin III, who, with his cavalcade of collaborators infiltrate a highly secured fortress-like safe named the 'Ark of Navarone' to claim the "Crimson Heart of Cleopatra

recommendations.title: The Castle of Cagliostro
recommendations.overview: After a successful robbery leaves famed thief Lupin the Third and his partner Jigen with nothing but a large amount of expertly crafted counterfeit bills, he decides to track down the forgers responsible—and steal any other treasures he may find in t

recommendations.title: Lupin the Third: Operation: Return the Treasure
recommendations.genres: Animation, TV Movie, Action, Comedy, Crime
recommendations.overview: After robbing a Moscow casino right under Zenigata's nose, Lupin is given a job to return 6 treasures to their original areas for an old friend of his, so Lupin can receive an even better treasure to gain.
